title: Refactor: generic typedHandler to eliminate parse/validate boilerplate
description: Replace 47 copies of ParseArgs + Validate boilerplate with a generic typedHandler[T] wrapper. Every handler repeats 5 lines of ceremony (ParseArgs, check err, Validate, check err). Add typedHandler[T interface{ Validate() error }] generic, migrate handlers file by file (bars, objectives, ideas, launches, roadmaps, utility), optionally kill the 40-case switch in registry.go. Pattern derived from miro-mcp-server makeHandler analysis. Scope: internal/tools/ only, no API changes, tests must pass unchanged.
